queries.question: Find the titles of courses that have 4 credits.
queries.sql: SELECT title FROM course WHERE credits = '4';

queries.question: What are the course titles that are taught in the 'Fall' semester of 2006 and have 4 credits?
queries.sql: SELECT T1.title FROM course AS T1 JOIN teaches AS T2 ON T1.title = T2.course_title WHERE T2.semester = 'Fall' AND T2.year = '2006' AND T1.credits = '4';

queries.question: List courses taught in the 'Fall' semester by instructors in the 'Comp. Sci.' department whose salary is below $60000.
queries.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.course_title FROM teaches AS T1 JOIN instructor AS T2 ON T1.instructor_name = T2.name WHERE T2.dept_name = 'Comp. Sci.' AND T1.semester = 'Fall' AND T2.salary < '60000';
